name: SIAB_SYSTEM
description: ABACUS 赝势轨道生成 system 部分输入参数

name: ILab_Grasp
description: 智能实验室项目机械臂控制节点

stir.description: Optional. If True, stir while heating or chilling.

temp.description: Temperature to heat or chill vessel to.

time.description: Time to heat or chill vessel for.

stir_speed.description: Optional. Speed in RPM at which to stir at if stir is True.

mass.description: Optional. Mass of reagent to add.

stir.description: Optional. If True, stir vessel while adding reagent.

time.description: Optional. Time to add reagent over.

amount.description: Optional. amount of reagent to add in moles, grams or equivalents. Sanitisation occurs on call of on_prepare_for_execution for this prop. This will change in future.

volume.description: Optional. Volume of reagent to add.

viscous.description: Optional. If True, adapt process to handle viscous reagent, e.g. use slower addition speeds.

dropwise.description: Optional. If True, use dropwise addition speed.

stir_speed.description: Optional. Speed in RPM at which to stir at if stir is True.

purpose.description: 'wash' or 'extract'. 'wash' means that product phase will not be the added solvent phase, 'extract' means product phase will be the added solvent phase. If no solvent is added just use 'extract'.

repeats.description: Optional. Number of separations to perform.

solvent.description: Optional. Solvent to add to separation vessel after contents of from_vessel has been transferred to create two phases.

through.description: Optional. Solid chemical to send product phase through on way to to_vessel, e.g. 'celite'.

stir_time.description: Optional. Time to stir for after adding solvent, before separation of phases.

to_vessel.description: Vessel to send product phase to.

stir_speed.description: Optional. Speed to stir at after adding solvent, before separation of phases.

from_vessel.description: Contents of from_vessel are transferred to separation_vessel and separation is performed.

product_phase.description: 'top' or 'bottom'. Phase that product will be in.

settling_time.description: Optional. Time to allow phases to settle before separation.

solvent_volume.description: Optional. Volume of solvent to add.

separation_vessel.description: Vessel in which separation of phases will be carried out.

waste_phase_to_vessel.description: Optional. Vessel to send waste phase to.

purpose.description: Optional. Purpose of stirring. Can be None or 'dissolve'. If None, assumed stirring is just to mix reagents.

stir_speed.description: Optional. Speed in RPM at which to stir at.

continue_stirring.description: Optional. If True, leave stirring on at end of step. Otherwise stop stirring at end of step.

temp.description: Optional. Temperature to heat vessel to while cleaning.

volume.description: Optional. Volume of solvent to clean vessel with.

repeats.description: Optional. Number of cleaning cycles to perform.

temp.description: Optional. Temperature to heat contents of vessel to for evaporation.

pressure.description: Optional. Vacuum pressure to use for evaporation.

stir_speed.description: Optional. Speed at which to stir mixture during evaporation. If using traditional rotavap, speed in RPM at which to rotate evaporation flask.

purpose.description: Optional. Purpose of stirring. Can be None or ‘dissolve’. If None, assumed stirring is just to mix reagents.

stir_speed.description: Optional. Speed in RPM at which to stir at.

temp.description: Temperature to heat or chill vessel to.

purpose.description: Optional. Purpose of heating/chilling. One of 'reaction', 'control-exotherm', 'unstable-reagent'.
